extDescription.message: Select and delete multiple notebooks at once on the NotebookLM home screen.

cardsNotFound.message: No notebook cards were found. SELECTORS.card may need adjustment.

moreButtonNotFound.message: The "More options" button was not found (card: $TITLE$). SELECTORS.moreButton may need adjustment.

menuNotOpened.message: The menu did not open (card: $TITLE$). SELECTORS.menuPopup may need adjustment.

deleteMenuItemNotFound.message: The "Delete" item in the menu was not found (card: $TITLE$). SELECTORS.deleteMenuItem may need adjustment.

confirmDialogNotShown.message: The confirmation dialog did not appear (card: $TITLE$). SELECTORS.confirmDialog may need adjustment.

confirmDeleteButtonNotFound.message: The delete button in the confirmation dialog was not found (card: $TITLE$). SELECTORS.confirmDeleteButton may need adjustment.

confirmDeleteMessage.message: This will delete $COUNT$ selected notebook(s). This action cannot be undone. Continue?

resumeStatus.message: Page was reloaded, automatically resuming deletion of the remaining $COUNT$ item(s)...

completeStatusFailedSuffix.message: (please reload the page and retry the failed items)
